summary: Guarded recurringExpectedDate against unknown granularity values from the API.
reason: addRecurringCadence silently returned the input on an unrecognized granularity string, sending the surrounding loop into 10000 no-op iterations before dropping the recurring item from the report with no signal. Pre-check via isKnownRecurringGranularity so an unknown value short-circuits cleanly. Closes Greptile re-review on PR #624.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli passes; addRecurringCadence default branch becomes unreachable via the guard.
